basics.description: Deploy the **MeshWeaver Memex** portal into your own Azure subscription. You own the infrastructure and the data; updates ship as new offer versions. The portal and its database run as Azure Container Apps from the public images at `ghcr.io/systemorph`.

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region for the Container Apps environment, Postgres, and storage.

elements.name: imageTag
elements.label: Image tag
elements.toolTip: Tag of the ghcr.io/systemorph/memex-portal-ai + memex-migration images to deploy (e.g. a released version).

elements.name: replicas
elements.label: Portal replicas
elements.toolTip: Orleans needs >= 2 for resilience under load. Single-node uses localhost clustering; >1 uses ADO.NET-Postgres clustering (HA).

elements.name: providers
elements.label: In-process model providers to enable
elements.toolTip: Which API-key providers ship (Features:Ai:Providers). Bring your own key below.

elements.name: modelProviderKey
elements.toolTip: Your Azure OpenAI / Azure AI Foundry / Anthropic key. Stored as an ARM secureString; injected as a container secret.

elements.name: modelProviderEndpoint
elements.label: Model provider endpoint
elements.toolTip: Azure OpenAI / Foundry endpoint URL (leave blank for direct OpenAI/Anthropic).

elements.name: includeAiClis
elements.label: Bundle co-hosted Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLIs (portal-ai image)
elements.toolTip: Deploys the larger portal-ai image so users can connect their own Claude/Copilot subscriptions. Uncheck for the lean portal.

elements.name: masterKey
elements.toolTip: Base64 32-byte key (Ai:KeyProtection:MasterKey) that envelope-encrypts stored provider credentials at rest. Keep it safe; rotating it invalidates stored keys.

elements.name: allowSelfOnboarding
elements.label: Allow new users to self-onboard (open registration)
elements.toolTip: When unchecked, only an administrator can provision users (the first user still bootstraps as admin). Maps to Features:Onboarding:AllowSelfOnboarding.
